hero.tagline: Your Band. Your Musicians. Your Stage.
hero.description: The all-in-one platform for managing your band, scheduling rehearsals and performances, and hiring the right musicians for every event.

pillars.label: Two Pillars
pillars.heading: Everything Your Band Needs
pillars.subheading: From day-to-day band operations to one-off event hires — one app covers it all.

bandManagement.title: Band Management
bandManagement.subtitle: Full control. Zero friction.
bandManagement.description: Create and manage your band, schedule rehearsals and performances, track member attendance, and handle everything from a single place.

musicianHiring.title: Musician Hiring
musicianHiring.subtitle: Find the right player. Every time.
musicianHiring.description: Post open agreements for external musicians, manage applications, and formalize collaborations with built-in contract and payment details.

featureGrid.label: Features
featureGrid.heading: Everything In One Place
featureGrid.subheading: From profiles to payments, Band Manager covers the full lifecycle of band management and musician hiring.

items.title: Musician Profiles
items.description: Instruments, proficiency levels, and personal info all in one place.

items.title: Band Creation
items.description: Create bands, generate unique join codes, and manage members easily.

items.title: Event Scheduling
items.description: Plan rehearsals and performances with dates, times, and locations.

items.title: Attendance Tracking
items.description: Know who confirmed, who declined, and who has not responded yet.

items.title: Hire Musicians
items.description: Post open positions and accept applications from external musicians.

items.title: Agreements
items.description: Formalize contracts with payment details, role, and performance info.

items.title: Role Management
items.description: Admin and member roles with fine-grained access control per band.

items.title: Media Uploads
items.description: Profile pictures and event images stored securely via Cloudinary.

howItWorks.label: How It Works
howItWorks.heading: Up And Running In Minutes
howItWorks.subheading: Four simple steps to go from signup to a fully managed band.

steps.title: Create Your Profile
steps.description: Sign up and build your musician profile with your instruments and proficiency levels.

steps.title: Join or Create a Band
steps.description: Start a new band and invite members with a unique code, or join an existing one.

steps.title: Schedule & Attend Events
steps.description: Add rehearsals and performances, confirm attendance, and track who shows up.

steps.title: Hire or Get Hired
steps.description: Post open agreements for external musicians, or apply as a musician for performances.

download.label: Available Now
download.subtitle: Free. No subscription. Direct APK download for Android.
download.downloadAriaLabel: Download Band Manager APK for Android
download.disclaimer: Not available on Google Play Store — sideloading required.
